# The Searing Blood
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=The%20Searing%20Blood&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = The Searing Blood
| desc = Collected from the veins of the fallen Firebreather, the blood's fiery structure may have its uses.
| slot = poison
| tier = ST

| totalDamage = 1300
| impactDamage = 450
| radius = 5.6
| cost = 130
| feedp = 400
| fameb = 5

| effects = yes
| poison = 850
| poisonDuration = 4

| lootbag = white
| dropsFrom = can be found in White Bags dropped by: [[Firebreather]].
}}

<noinclude>
{{NavPoisons}}
[[Category:Poisons]]
</noinclude>
